rationale: Educ. Code §45.051 is a definitions provision for school district bond guaranty terms (board, charter district, paying agent). It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised value limits, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote:
Sec. 45.051. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Board" means the State Board of Education.
_note: Rule text is purely definitional and unrelated to homestead exemption amounts; no conflict detected.
